article.body_preview:
DHAKA, April 4, 2023 (BSS) - Private consumption, private investment and growth in industry are expected to rise in Bangladesh in the coming days while accelerating key reforms would help the country sustain higher growth, said Asian Development Bank (ADB) country director for Bangladesh Edimon Ginting.
